channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytip, 25th April
item.description:
1-29 Manor Grove. Please clear flytipp

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Grove, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic lights all out, 25th April
item.description:
I would like to report all traffic lights at Great Portland Street are currently not functioning. This poses a significant risk of accidents, especially at busy times. Could you please address this issue urgently to ensure the safety of all road users and pedestrians. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 240-242, Great Portland Street, Marylebone, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dismantled kitchen fittings and wooden pallet on the pavement, 25th April
item.description:
Items are left here e very single day.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lampard Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 25th April

Outside flats believe this no ::0 Chesterfiekd wa Please clear flytip

item.title: Failure to cut grass verges on Clarendon Way, 25th April
item.description:
On March 4 the grass verges on Wimborne Av. Berens Way and Marlings Park were cut . But the Clarendon Way verges were not, and have not been cut since the previous cut before March 4. The grass is becoming long and untidy and the next cut will create unusually large piles of cut grass on the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Clarendon Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bed, 25th April
item.description:
Dumped bed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Venner Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on the pavement, 25th April
item.description:
Rubbish bags full of rubbles have been left by the Regal House entrance by a tree. Causing more fly tipping on top of it for the past 2 weeks. This space is needed to unload equipment to the Regal House on a daily basis.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lower Clapton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffit, 25th April
item.description:
Queens Road junction of Erlanger Road Please remove graffiti from bus shelter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen's Road, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Dangerous potholes on Perry St near Alva Glen entrance / exit Perry Street Chislehurst BR7 6HA, 25th April
item.description:
Potholes have been here for well over two months now and are hazardous for cyclists.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A green bin full of rubbish and some bricks, 25th April
item.description:
This is left by the garages, no lid, and needs to be moved Neither bin men or recycling will touch it - it has been there for 3 weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Coombe Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Influx of graffiti along Sidney Street SW9. The graffiti is very visible on the walls and street boxes is along the entire length of Sidney Street., 25th April
item.description:
I like to report an influx of graffiti along Sidney Street SW9. The graffiti is very visible and unfortunately runs the entire length of Sidney street both on the walls and street boxes. Please can the graffiti be removed it only attracts more of it to appear from others. The graffiti has been there for over a month.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Sidney Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple very deep potholes, 25th April
item.description:
Hi there. Lewisham hill from the middle to the top of the hill is filled with multiple deep potholes. They are so deep cars are swerving to avoid or crashing down into them. There are now so many that cars are swerving everywhere that no. one is concentrating on saferty. Last count 15. When your wheel goes into one it sounds so damaging to the car that you, like lots of people are pulling over to see if your wheel is still intact and there's no other damage. Thanks for your help. Appreciated.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lewisham Hill, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole on Perry St, near Thompsons Perry Street, , Chislehurst, Kent, BR7 6HA, 25th April
item.description:
2 hazardous potholes has been here for over two months and danger to cyclists especially.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
